name: amr-service-platform
description: AMR Service Management Platform — Backend + Frontend

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run prisma:seed
